main: Hello there! My name is ${name} and I am a web developer based in München.
about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: I'm so glad you dropped by. I'm Flavius Cojocariu, a friendly and experienced Software Engineer, based in München, Germany, with a keen focus on crafting amazing web experiences. I believe in embracing life's adventures and constantly seeking opportunities to grow and learn. Let's dive into my story!
about.paragraph2: My work philosophy revolves around constant growth and innovation. I believe that staying curious and adaptable is crucial in an ever-evolving landscape. Through each project, I aim to deliver not just results but also meaningful experiences that resonate with audiences and clients alike.
about.paragraph3: Throughout my career, I've been fortunate enough to contribute to some pretty fantastic projects. From responsive websites that adapt like chameleons to web applications with seamless user experiences, I take immense pride in every line of code I write. Some of the companies I have worked for, are part of IoT/fintech industry, travel industry and even telecom and market research.
about.paragraph4: I'm excited about the future and the possibilities it holds. I'm open to new collaborations, challenges, and endeavors that push the boundaries of creativity and innovation.
about.paragraph5: Thank you for taking the time to explore my portfolio. If you have any questions, want to discuss potential projects, or simply want to connect, don't hesitate to reach out.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: In my portfolio, you'll find a curated selection of my best work, showcasing my ability my ability to craft dynamic and user-friendly web applications that seamlessly blend creativity with cutting-edge technologies. Each project reflects my commitment to excellence and a keen eye for detail.
